{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Order Fulfilment Executive",
  "description": "Maxitech Global Investment Limited is an equal-opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Order Fulfilment Executive
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos (Reliably commute or planning to relocate before starting work (Required))
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Order Fulfilment Executive is responsible for processing, verifying, and coordinating customer orders from confirmation to final dispatch.
	This role serves as a critical operational control point before products leave the warehouse, ensuring all orders meet strict accuracy, payment verification, and documentation standards.
	The successful candidate must demonstrate exceptional attention to detail, strong process discipline, and the ability to manage multiple orders in a fast-paced operational environment.
	This position is ideal for individuals who take pride in precision, accountability, and structured operational processes.


Key Responsibilities
Order Processing &amp; Verification:


	Process customer orders using the company ERP system (Odoo) and internal order documentation.
	Verify order details including product specifications, quantity, pricing, and payment confirmation before processing.
	Ensure all order records are accurately documented in accordance with company procedures.


Order Fulfilment Coordination:


	Coordinate with warehouse and inventory teams to ensure correct product picking and packing.
	Track order progress and ensure orders are fulfilled within required timelines.
	Escalate potential delays or discrepancies promptly.


Dispatch Accuracy Control:


	Conduct final verification checks before order dispatch.
	Confirm that items released match customer orders in specification, quantity, and documentation.
	Verify serial numbers where applicable for high-value items such as laptops and tablets.


Inventory Control Support:


	Report discrepancies between physical inventory and ERP records immediately.
	Support inventory reconciliation exercises when required.
	Ensure accurate documentation during stock handover to logistics teams or customers.


Customer Communication:


	Provide order updates where required.
	Escalate order issues or stock shortages promptly.
	Ensure all order communication records are properly documented.


Process Compliance:


	Follow all Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) related to order processing and dispatch.
	Reject or suspend order processing where payment confirmation or required documentation is incomplete.
	Identify and report operational gaps that could lead to fulfilment errors.


Requirements


	OND / HND / BSc in any of the following fields: Business Administration, Logistics or Supply Chain Management, Operations Management or Related disciplines
	1&ndash;3 years of in any of the following areas: Order fulfilment, Inventory management, Warehouse operations, Logistics coordination, ERP-based operational environments.


Technical Skills:


	Familiarity with ERP systems (Odoo experience is an advantage)
	Strong knowledge of Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets
	Ability to reconcile orders, invoices, and stock records.


Core Competencies:
We are looking for candidates who demonstrate:


	Exceptional attention to detail
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	High level of accountability and integrity
	Ability to work under pressure while maintaining accuracy
	Strong process discipline and operational awareness.


Performance Metrics (KPIs)


	Performance in this role will be evaluated based on:
	Order processing accuracy
	Dispatch verification accuracy
	Order fulfilment turnaround time
	ERP documentation compliance
	Inventory reconciliation accuracy.


Work Environment:


	This role operates in a fast-paced technology distribution environment where operational accuracy and process discipline are essential.
	Candidates must be comfortable managing multiple orders while maintaining strict verification standards.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 per month.&nbsp;

Why Join Maxitech Global:


	Work within a rapidly growing technology distribution company
	Gain exposure to structured ERP-based operational systems
	Opportunity for professional development and career progression
	Structured operational environment focused on efficiency and accuracy.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV, and short cover letter highlighting relevant fulfilment, logistics, or inventory experience to:&nbsp;olamilekan.sule@maxitechglobal.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-30",

Order Fulfilment Executive Job at Maxitech Global Investment Limited




        
    

        
        Maxitech Global Investment Limited is an equal-opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Order Fulfilment Executive
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos (Reliably commute or planning to relocate before starting work (Required))
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Order Fulfilment Executive is responsible for processing, verifying, and coordinating customer orders from confirmation to final dispatch.
	This role serves as a critical operational control point before products leave the warehouse, ensuring all orders meet strict accuracy, payment verification, and documentation standards.
	The successful candidate must demonstrate exceptional attention to detail, strong process discipline, and the ability to manage multiple orders in a fast-paced operational environment.
	This position is ideal for individuals who take pride in precision, accountability, and structured operational processes.


Key Responsibilities
Order Processing & Verification:


	Process customer orders using the company ERP system (Odoo) and internal order documentation.
	Verify order details including product specifications, quantity, pricing, and payment confirmation before processing.
	Ensure all order records are accurately documented in accordance with company procedures.


Order Fulfilment Coordination:


	Coordinate with warehouse and inventory teams to ensure correct product picking and packing.
	Track order progress and ensure orders are fulfilled within required timelines.
	Escalate potential delays or discrepancies promptly.


Dispatch Accuracy Control:


	Conduct final verification checks before order dispatch.
	Confirm that items released match customer orders in specification, quantity, and documentation.
	Verify serial numbers where applicable for high-value items such as laptops and tablets.


Inventory Control Support:


	Report discrepancies between physical inventory and ERP records immediately.
	Support inventory reconciliation exercises when required.
	Ensure accurate documentation during stock handover to logistics teams or customers.


Customer Communication:


	Provide order updates where required.
	Escalate order issues or stock shortages promptly.
	Ensure all order communication records are properly documented.


Process Compliance:


	Follow all Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) related to order processing and dispatch.
	Reject or suspend order processing where payment confirmation or required documentation is incomplete.
	Identify and report operational gaps that could lead to fulfilment errors.


Requirements


	OND / HND / BSc in any of the following fields: Business Administration, Logistics or Supply Chain Management, Operations Management or Related disciplines
	1–3 years of in any of the following areas: Order fulfilment, Inventory management, Warehouse operations, Logistics coordination, ERP-based operational environments.


Technical Skills:


	Familiarity with ERP systems (Odoo experience is an advantage)
	Strong knowledge of Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets
	Ability to reconcile orders, invoices, and stock records.


Core Competencies:
We are looking for candidates who demonstrate:


	Exceptional attention to detail
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	High level of accountability and integrity
	Ability to work under pressure while maintaining accuracy
	Strong process discipline and operational awareness.


Performance Metrics (KPIs)


	Performance in this role will be evaluated based on:
	Order processing accuracy
	Dispatch verification accuracy
	Order fulfilment turnaround time
	ERP documentation compliance
	Inventory reconciliation accuracy.


Work Environment:


	This role operates in a fast-paced technology distribution environment where operational accuracy and process discipline are essential.
	Candidates must be comfortable managing multiple orders while maintaining strict verification standards.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Why Join Maxitech Global:


	Work within a rapidly growing technology distribution company
	Gain exposure to structured ERP-based operational systems
	Opportunity for professional development and career progression
	Structured operational environment focused on efficiency and accuracy.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV, and short cover letter highlighting relevant fulfilment, logistics, or inventory experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Vacancies at AllFlavors Supreme Foods
content:
AllFlavors Supreme Foods manufactures premium snacks with high quality ingredients, using top quality machines and advanced techniques to reach and maintain our products' premium quality. We are ISO 9001 and 22000 certified.

We are recruiting to fill the positions below:

1.) Production Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a competent,dedicated and detail-oriented Production Officer to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will oversee production processes, ensure adherence to safety and quality standards, and help drive operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and coordinate daily production activities.
	Ensure compliance with food safety and hygiene standards.
	Maintain production schedules and meet output targets.
	Report on production performance and suggest improvements.
	Supervise and support production staff.
	Assist with inventory management of raw materials and finished goods.
	Ensure proper maintenance of production equipment.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Food Science, Food Technology, Industrial Engineering, or related field.
	Minimum of 2 years experience in a food production or manufacturing environment.
	Knowledge of HACCP, GMP, and other food safety regulations.
	Strong organizational and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent communication and leadership abilities.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced production environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	A supportive and dynamicwork environment
	Health and safety-focused work environment
	Career growth and development opportunities
	Opportunity tfor professional growth and developemnt


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Production Officer” as the subject of the mail.


2.) Driver

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a reliable and professional Driver to support our operations through the safe transportation of persons and the timely delivery of goods as assigned.
	The ideal candidate will demonstrate strong driving skills, a high sense of responsibility, and a commitment to safety and professionalism.


Key Responsibilities


	Safely and promptly drive the executive to designated locations as required.
	Deliver goods and documents accurately and on time
	Ensure the vehicle is clean, well-maintained, and roadworthy at all times
	Conduct routine vehicle checks and report any mechanical issues promptly
	Adhere to all traffic laws, safety regulations, and company policies
	Maintain accurate delivery and trip records where required
	Provide courteous and professional service at all times


Requirements & Qualifications


	Valid driver’s license & LASDRI with a clean driving record
	Proven experience as a driver (personal, corporate, or commercial driving is an advantage)
	Good knowledge of local routes and traffic regulations
	Ability to follow instructions and schedules efficiently
	Strong time management and communication skills
	High level of integrity, reliability, and professionalism.


Method of Application 
Interested candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

3.) Sales Support Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Sales Support Officer to assist our sales team in driving revenue growth and ensuring seamless customer service operations.


Responsibilities


	Provide administrative and operational support to the sales team
	Process customer orders and ensure accurate documentation
	Coordinate with production, warehouse, and logistics teams to track order fulfillment
	Maintain updated customer records and sales databases
	Prepare sales reports, performance dashboards, and presentations
	Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and follow-ups professionally
	Support the sales team in achieving monthly and quarterly targets
	Monitor stock levels and communicate availability to customers


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field
	1-3 years of experience in sales support, customer service, or FMCG environment
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially Excel and Word)
	Experience with ERP or sales management systems is an added advantage
	Ability to work in a fast-paced manufacturing environment.


What we offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	A dynamic and collaborative work environment
	Health and safety-focused work environment
	Career growth and development opportunities
	Opportunity to work in a structured manufacturing setting.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Sales Support" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Office Assistant & Administration",
  "description": "Alcatraz Technologies Limited is a full service Electronic security systems integrator, specializing in Electronic Security Entrance Management Solutions, Screening Solutions, Surveillance Management Solutions, Fire Fighting Management Solution, Mass Notification Systems, Security Doors, Event Security Services, Alarm Monitoring and Event Security Rental Services.

We design, supply, install, maintain and repair security systems that integrate physical security devices, electronic technology, and information (IT) systems. This convergent approach streamlines management and increases capabilities.We remain vendor-neutral and clearly focused on providing the right solution to each client, whether they need a complete turnkey solution, technical services or consulting services. When it comes to minimizing your company&rsquo;s risk and maximizing your budget, Alcatraz Technologies Limited will provide reliable and exceptional service.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Assistant &amp; Administration

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Provide project coordination support, including organizing and maintaining project files, tracking deadlines, and assisting with project documentation.
	Assist with all client support activities, during and after various projects.
	Coordinate and assist with event planning tasks, such as scheduling meetings, booking venues, arranging refreshments, and managing logistics.
	Perform various clerical duties, including filing documents, data entry, photocopying, scanning and any other task assigned.
	Act as a personal assistant to the Directors by managing calendars, scheduling appointments, and making travel arrangements.
	Handle administrative and out of office task to clients
	Utilize Excel Sheets and assist with bookkeeping tasks, such as invoicing clients, tracking expenses.
	Serve as a receptionist in a medical office setting by greeting patients, checking them in/out, and directing them to the appropriate departments or rooms.
	Perform order entry tasks by accurately inputting customer orders into the system and ensuring timely processing.


&nbsp;Requirements


	Proven experience in an administrative role or similar position is preferred.
	Strong organizational skills with the ability to multitask and prioritize tasks effectively.
	Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written.
	Proficient in using computer software programs such as Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information with professionalism.
	Attention to detail and accuracy in performing clerical tasks.
	Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or as part of a team.


Salary
N70,000 per month.

Method of Applicaton&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send a short Application Letter and one-page CV with your picture attached to your application via:&nbsp;hr@alcatraztechltd.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Kindly review our website and social media pages for more information on the company&rsquo;s products and services.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Office Assistant & Administration Job at Alcatraz Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Alcatraz Technologies Limited is a full service Electronic security systems integrator, specializing in Electronic Security Entrance Management Solutions, Screening Solutions, Surveillance Management Solutions, Fire Fighting Management Solution, Mass Notification Systems, Security Doors, Event Security Services, Alarm Monitoring and Event Security Rental Services.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We design, supply, install, maintain and repair security systems that integrate physical security devices, electronic technology, and information (IT) systems. This convergent approach streamlines management and increases capabilities.We remain vendor-neutral and clearly focused on providing the right solution to each client, whether they need a complete turnkey solution, technical services or consulting services. When it comes to minimizing your company’s risk and maximizing your budget, Alcatraz Technologies Limited will provide reliable and exceptional service.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Assistant & Administration

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Provide project coordination support, including organizing and maintaining project files, tracking deadlines, and assisting with project documentation.
	Assist with all client support activities, during and after various projects.
	Coordinate and assist with event planning tasks, such as scheduling meetings, booking venues, arranging refreshments, and managing logistics.
	Perform various clerical duties, including filing documents, data entry, photocopying, scanning and any other task assigned.
	Act as a personal assistant to the Directors by managing calendars, scheduling appointments, and making travel arrangements.
	Handle administrative and out of office task to clients
	Utilize Excel Sheets and assist with bookkeeping tasks, such as invoicing clients, tracking expenses.
	Serve as a receptionist in a medical office setting by greeting patients, checking them in/out, and directing them to the appropriate departments or rooms.
	Perform order entry tasks by accurately inputting customer orders into the system and ensuring timely processing.


 Requirements


	Proven experience in an administrative role or similar position is preferred.
	Strong organizational skills with the ability to multitask and prioritize tasks effectively.
	Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written.
	Proficient in using computer software programs such as Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information with professionalism.
	Attention to detail and accuracy in performing clerical tasks.
	Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or as part of a team.


Salary
N70,000 per month.

Method of Applicaton 
Interested and qualified candidates should send a short Application Letter and one-page CV with your picture attached to your application via: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Kindly review our website and social media pages for more information on the company’s products and services.
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project / Field Engineer",
  "description": "Karsto Global Resources Limited is a wholly owned Nigerian company, established with a view to rendering quality onshore/offshore, project management consultancy, construction and construction management, inspection, repair and maintenance, supply chain and inventory management and rope access to the oil and gas industry in the West African sub region.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project / Field Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers

Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly qualified Project Engineer to join our team. As a Project / Field Engineer, you will play a crucial role in overseeing the technical and practical execution of engineering projects offsite and on-site.
	You will also be responsible for ensuring projects are completed safely, on time, within budget, and according to design specifications.
	The role bridges the gap between design, planning, and on-site construction. To plan, organise and control all elements of the project and ensure the requirements of Contracts are met satisfactorily.


Main Responsibilities


	Prepare, schedule, coordinate and monitor the assigned engineering projects
	Responsible for scheduling, conducting and coordinating the technical and managerial aspect of projects.
	Monitoring project status reports and change orders.
	Accountable for the successful completion of engineering projects.
	Requires extensive regular contact with assigned project clients.
	Assist in the preparation of engineering projects proposals.
	Budget monitoring and trend tracking.
	Participate in Client / Contractor meetings and resolving Client / Engineering and management project issues.
	Keep an eye on all relevant safety objectives and legal requirements.
	Interpret clients&#39; requirements.
	Identify engineering problems and ensure solutions are implemented.
	Evaluate, organize and prioritize workload within a schedule.
	Liaise with third party contractors to ensure all equipment are fit for purpose.
	Take responsibility for a team of engineers.
	Take full responsibility for any assigned project from commencement to completion whether on shoe, offshore or swamp.
	Coordinate Tenders from start to finish.
	Head the site HSE meeting / discussion and attend the morning pep talk before start of work.
	Supervise all engineering operations at any given location.
	Act as service representative in the field.
	Contribute to the preparation of site reports.
	Supervise technicians, technologists, and other engineers and review / approve designs, calculations and cost estimates.


Qualifications / Requirements


	B.Sc. / B.Eng. / HND in engineering field. A Masters&rsquo; degree will be an added advantage with&nbsp;Experience: 3&ndash;5 years post qualification / (NYSC) experience
	COREN / NSE membership is an added advantage
	Proven experience working in a Project management role in manufacturing, construction and / or oil and gas industries
	Verifiable experience in the use of MS Office packages.
	HSE Level 3 minimum
	Should reside in Port Harcourt or willing to relocate.


Skills and Competencies:


	Microsoft Office Project
	Primavera
	Ability to use initiative
	The ability to explain design and plans clearly
	Confident decision-making ability
	A comprehensive knowledge of relevant legal regulations
	Excellent oral and written communication skills
	High level of accuracy and attention to details
	Ability to work under pressure with tight deadlines
	Ability to work with initiative, autonomously and as part of a team
	Ability to maintain confidentiality of information.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;offixrecruit@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Project / Field Engineer&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-29",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

Project / Field Engineer Job at Karsto Global Resources Limited




        
    

        
        Karsto Global Resources Limited is a wholly owned Nigerian company, established with a view to rendering quality onshore/offshore, project management consultancy, construction and construction management, inspection, repair and maintenance, supply chain and inventory management and rope access to the oil and gas industry in the West African sub region.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project / Field Engineer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly qualified Project Engineer to join our team. As a Project / Field Engineer, you will play a crucial role in overseeing the technical and practical execution of engineering projects offsite and on-site.
	You will also be responsible for ensuring projects are completed safely, on time, within budget, and according to design specifications.
	The role bridges the gap between design, planning, and on-site construction. To plan, organise and control all elements of the project and ensure the requirements of Contracts are met satisfactorily.


Main Responsibilities


	Prepare, schedule, coordinate and monitor the assigned engineering projects
	Responsible for scheduling, conducting and coordinating the technical and managerial aspect of projects.
	Monitoring project status reports and change orders.
	Accountable for the successful completion of engineering projects.
	Requires extensive regular contact with assigned project clients.
	Assist in the preparation of engineering projects proposals.
	Budget monitoring and trend tracking.
	Participate in Client / Contractor meetings and resolving Client / Engineering and management project issues.
	Keep an eye on all relevant safety objectives and legal requirements.
	Interpret clients' requirements.
	Identify engineering problems and ensure solutions are implemented.
	Evaluate, organize and prioritize workload within a schedule.
	Liaise with third party contractors to ensure all equipment are fit for purpose.
	Take responsibility for a team of engineers.
	Take full responsibility for any assigned project from commencement to completion whether on shoe, offshore or swamp.
	Coordinate Tenders from start to finish.
	Head the site HSE meeting / discussion and attend the morning pep talk before start of work.
	Supervise all engineering operations at any given location.
	Act as service representative in the field.
	Contribute to the preparation of site reports.
	Supervise technicians, technologists, and other engineers and review / approve designs, calculations and cost estimates.


Qualifications / Requirements


	B.Sc. / B.Eng. / HND in engineering field. A Masters’ degree will be an added advantage with Experience: 3–5 years post qualification / (NYSC) experience
	COREN / NSE membership is an added advantage
	Proven experience working in a Project management role in manufacturing, construction and / or oil and gas industries
	Verifiable experience in the use of MS Office packages.
	HSE Level 3 minimum
	Should reside in Port Harcourt or willing to relocate.


Skills and Competencies:


	Microsoft Office Project
	Primavera
	Ability to use initiative
	The ability to explain design and plans clearly
	Confident decision-making ability
	A comprehensive knowledge of relevant legal regulations
	Excellent oral and written communication skills
	High level of accuracy and attention to details
	Ability to work under pressure with tight deadlines
	Ability to work with initiative, autonomously and as part of a team
	Ability to maintain confidentiality of information.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Project / Field Engineer” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
